name: 1000 SCORE: 2D Platformer
short_description: No mistakes allowed! No checkpoints, no safety nets. Just move forward and survive. If you fail, you lose everything and start over. A true test of nerves!
detailed_description:
1000 SCORE

1,000 LEVELS. ONE CHANCE. ZERO MISTAKES.

Forget complex mechanics or impossible levels. This game is a test of pure focus and consistency. The levels are short and fluid, but there is only one rule: You cannot fail.

Key Features:

  • Fast & Fluid: Bite-sized, short levels that can be completed in seconds.

  • No Checkpoints: No save points, no safety nets. If you fail, you lose everything and start over from Level 1.

  • Minimalist Pixel Art: Clean and stylish minimal pixel graphics that keep the focus where it belongs—on the gameplay.

  • A Massive Journey: A total of 1,000 unique stages to conquer.

  • Master Your Score: Every short level you clear grants you +1 score. How long can you stay focused to reach 1,000?

Just Move Forward and Survive. The levels won't break you, but can you handle the pressure of knowing one slip-up sends you back to the start?
